title: Movie Recommender System
tagline: production-style movie ranking system with offline ML and a Go serving layer
summary: I built an end-to-end recommendation system instead of stopping at a model notebook. Python handles the offline data and ranking work, a Go service serves recommendations, and a Next.js interface makes the results explorable.
outcome: Improved NDCG@10 by 11.8% over baseline and served ranked results at 16.6ms p95 latency.
